description: Style noteDeveloped by ScentStory, 24 The Fragrance "Gold" is inspired by Jack Bauer from the TV series 24 (which is the longest running series in TV history and ranked as the 6th greatest television show of all-time!) The precious gold coloured bottle inspires feelings of power and success. With this scent you'll be able to embody Jack's extraordinary strength of character and determination through adversity - all without raising a sweat! Product DetailsThe 24 Gold fragrance opens with vibrant, dynamic tones and has a captivating fresh, woody, oriental fragrance.  It contains notes of jasmine, sandalwood, amber and vanilla. CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
